creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
dhn         2011-03-07 11:40:06 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security             Makefile 
  Added files:
    security/p5-IO-Async-SSL Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This module extends existing IO::Async classes with extra methods to
  allow the use of SSL or TLS-based connections using IO::Socket::SSL.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/IO-Async-SSL/
  
  PR:             ports/155336
  Submitted by:   "ports@c0decafe.net" <ports@c0decafe.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1155    +1 -0      ports/security/Makefile

  1.1       +2 -0      ports/security/p5-IO-Async-SSL/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/security/p5-IO-Async-SSL/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/security/p5-IO-Async-SSL/pkg-plist (new)
